epistemic_status: Bounded by CTD Principle; structured workloads only
claim_boundary: Formalism-derived comparison. Not measured pool-side hashrate, not ASIC replacement proof, not universal SHA-256 acceleration, and not physical quantum hardware execution.

comparative_metrics.structured_scaling: phi-logarithmic structured-state model; unstructured states remain exponential
comparative_metrics.energy_parity: reported as a projection by benchmarks/real_world_comparison_report.py, not a live hardware certification
comparative_metrics.determinism_ratio: 1.00 for deterministic formalism replay paths only
